allow: Bash(python -c "import fastapi, uvicorn, langgraph, anthropic, pandas, numpy")
Bash(python -m pip install --quiet fastapi uvicorn langgraph anthropic pandas numpy)
Bash(python -c "import fastapi, uvicorn, langgraph, anthropic, pandas; print\('deps ok'\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/generate-review -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"persona": "Lagos food blogger, values price, writes in Pidgin", "product": "Jollof rice at Chicken Republic Lekki"}' -w '\\n--- HTTP %{http_code} ---\\n')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8002/recommend -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"persona": "Lagos professional who loves Nollywood and thrillers", "domain": "Movies", "niche": "psychological thriller"}' -w '\\n--- HTTP %{http_code} ---\\n')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8001/generate-review -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"persona": "Lagos food blogger, values price, writes in Pidgin", "product": "Jollof rice at Chicken Republic Lekki"}' -w "\\n--- HTTP %{http_code} ---\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8002/recommend -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"persona": "Lagos professional who loves Nollywood and thrillers", "domain": "Movies", "niche": "psychological thriller"}' -w "\\n--- HTTP %{http_code} ---\\n")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8002/recommend -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"persona": "Lagos entrepreneur", "domain": "xyzqq", "niche": null}' -w "\\n--- HTTP %{http_code} ---\\n")
Bash(curl -s -i -X OPTIONS http://127.0.0.1:8001/generate-review -H 'Origin: null' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type')
